AccessCode.title: AccessCode
AccessCode.description: An access code/licence for the e-book with a strict device login threshold of 2.

maxLogins.description: The maximum number of concurrent active device logins allowed (typically 2).

activeLogins.description: The session IDs currently using this access code.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the code was created.

/access_codes/{code}.description: Collection of short passwords which are mapped to their respective devices.
